title: Verify existing implementation of partition utility
description: The partition utility function already exists at src/utils/partition.ts with 9 passing tests covering: basic partitioning, empty arrays, all-matching predicates, no-matching predicates, string arrays, object types, mixed types, order preservation, and single element arrays. Implementation uses a simple for-loop with two arrays (truthy/falsy) and returns a tuple [T[], T[]].
existing_patterns: src/utils/chunk.ts - similar array utility function pattern
src/utils/flatten.ts - similar array utility function pattern
